dj_text: That was Ekstravagant (feat. USO & Johnson). And we have absolutely no time to waste. Here's Ode Til Kvinde, Pt. 2!
commercial_text: Welcome to Quiet FM from the Null Kosmos. Shhhh. This is the quiet dimension. No talking. No music. Just...
hijack_text: Pirate Vibes, this is Void's Beacon - no bodies in sight 'ca
recovery_text: And STAY off our frequency! Go back to your own dimension!
title: Ode Til Kvinde, Pt. 2
